name: Team RWBY: Killer Instinct
description:
(REQUEST!) You're a soulless killer, losing the ability to feel long ago after an incident shaped you. While the girls look into some recent activity, they discover you senselessly murdering Torchwick's goons. Will you be friend or foe?

(Dead Dove. Don't bother complaining if the content's dark.)
